events.title: Sacred Cacao, Balinese Ritual & Sound Journey — Fridays
events.description: A weekly ceremonial evening at Heart Space Bali — Ubud's dedicated ceremony studio on Jl. Nyuh Kuning. The evening opens with a Vital Cacao ceremony woven through a Balinese blessing ritual and gratitude offering, moves into slow yin movement to ground and open the body, and closes with a live sacred sound journey: crystal singing bowls, chimes, and voice. Ceremony-first register throughout; the yin element is somatic framing for the sound work, not a yoga class. Doors at 7pm, ceremony begins 7:15pm. IDR 350,000.
events.short_description: Weekly Friday cacao ceremony, Balinese ritual, and sacred sound journey at Heart Space Bali.
events.venue_address: Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Cacao, Restorative Movement & Healing Sound — Sundays
events.description: Heart Space Bali's weekly Sunday ceremony: a heart-opening Vital Cacao ritual leads into restorative somatic movement — slow, floor-based, nervous-system-settling — then closes with a live healing sound journey of crystal singing bowls, acoustic instruments, and voice. The movement here is ceremony medicine, not yoga. Held in the dedicated ceremony space at Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1. Doors at 7pm, ceremony begins 7:15pm. IDR 350,000.
events.short_description: Weekly Sunday cacao ceremony, restorative movement, and healing sound journey at Heart Space Bali.
events.venue_address: Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1, Ubud, Bali
